CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Set For Trial On Dec-07-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NEEL SOMANI's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The unopposed motion for pro hac vice admission of Ariella O. Guardi is granted.
Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
